title: platea excelsa
intro: Platea excelsa, also known as the Giant Platea, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Platea excelsa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat various infections. Herbal preparations of Platea excelsa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
